name: Sunset Floral Maxi Dress
description: An elegant off-the-shoulder maxi dress with a bold tropical floral print in orange and navy tones. Features a flowing skirt and a flattering cinched waist.

name: Vibrant Leaf Print Bubu Kaftan
description: A stunning multi-colored Bubu dress featuring a bold leaf motif and delicate black lace accents. Designed for a loose, comfortable, and elegant fit.

name: Kaleidoscope Geometric A-Line Maxi
description: A high-impact A-line maxi dress featuring a vibrant geometric mosaic print, short sleeves, and a full-volume flared skirt.

name: Enchanted Rose Garden Maxi Gown
description: A vibrant maxi gown featuring a bold multi-colored rose print, a fitted waist with hidden pockets, and a full-length flared silhouette.

name: Magenta Mosaic Kaftan with Prism Accents
description: A stylish magenta midi kaftan featuring a textured line pattern, V-neckline, and a bold rainbow geometric accent on the collar and pocket.

name: Emerald Mosaic Kaftan with Prism Accents
description: A refreshing lime-green midi kaftan featuring a textured pattern, V-neckline, and colorful rainbow geometric accents on the pocket and collar.

name: Midnight Daisy Bubu Kaftan
description: A navy blue Bubu kaftan featuring a bold orange daisy print, finished with sparkling black sequin trim along the neckline and front.

name: Crimson Wave Ruched Maxi Dress
description: A dynamic red and orange maxi dress with a wavy abstract print, featuring adjustable ruched sleeves and a full flared skirt.

name: Fuchsia Mosaic Puff-Sleeve Gown
description: A luxury fuchsia maxi gown featuring dramatic puff sleeves with ribbon ties, a fitted waist, and a full, patterned mosaic skirt.

name: Emerald Mosaic Puff-Sleeve Gown
description: A vibrant lime-green maxi gown with an abstract mosaic pattern, featuring oversized puff sleeves with adjustable ties and a full-volume skirt.

name: Cobalt Floral Bubu Tent Dress
description: A classic Bubu-style tent dress in a deep cobalt blue with a white floral stamp print. Features playful ruffled straps and contrasting geometric-print patch pockets for a modern twist on a traditional silhouette.

name: Fuchsia Tiered Prism Gown
description: A solid magenta maxi gown featuring a square neckline and two decorative tiered ruffles in a vibrant, multi-colored geometric print.

name: Forest Green Tiered Prism Gown
description: A deep forest green maxi gown featuring a sweetheart neckline and two decorative tiered ruffles in contrasting rainbow geometric patterns.

name: Tropical Paradise Collared Maxi Gown
description: A sophisticated shirt-style maxi gown featuring a vibrant multi-colored tropical leaf print, a pointed collar, and a dramatic flared skirt.

name: Onyx Orbit Collared Maxi Gown
description: A tailored shirt-style maxi gown featuring a black base with a colorful ring pattern, a pointed collar, and a voluminous flared skirt.

name: Fuchsia Abstract Origami Maxi Gown
description: An avant-garde maxi gown featuring a bold multi-colored geometric abstract print and a modern asymmetric off-the-shoulder neckline.

name: Onyx Flare Midi Dress with Pink Mosaic Insets
description: A sophisticated black midi dress with a flared skirt featuring contrasting pink geometric print insets for a dynamic, stylish look.

name: Azure Flow V-Neck Maxi
description: A graceful maxi dress featuring a fluid wavy print in shades of blue and white, with a classic V-neck and a soft flared silhouette.

name: Fuchsia Bloom Bubu Tent Dress
description: A playful and airy Bubu-style tent dress in vibrant fuchsia pink with a white floral stamp pattern. Features ruffled straps in a multi-colored geometric print and matching oversized front patch pockets.

name: Fuchsia & Citrus Tiered Maxi Gown
description: A vibrant tiered maxi gown featuring a fuchsia pink bodice with a white floral stamp pattern and capped sleeves. The voluminous skirt transitions into alternating tiers of sunny yellow, emerald green, and orange, all adorned with a matching circular motif.

name: Magenta Mosaic One-Shoulder Gown
description: An elegant and modern one-shoulder maxi gown featuring a dramatic puff sleeve and a rich magenta mosaic-patterned fabric.

name: Fuchsia Tiered Prism Gown
description: A striking solid fuchsia maxi gown featuring a sweetheart neckline and two decorative tiered ruffles in a vibrant, multi-colored geometric prism print.

name: Emerald Geometric Mini Skater Dress
description: A vibrant emerald and lime green mini dress featuring a bold diamond geometric pattern, a flattering V-neckline, and adjustable ruched tie-sleeves.

name: Azure Blossom Bubu Maxi
description: A full-length, voluminous Bubu maxi dress in rich royal blue, adorned with a white floral stamp pattern. It features playful ruffled tie-shoulders and signature multi-colored geometric patch pockets.

name: Autumn Bloom Off-Shoulder Gown
description: A breathtaking floor-length gown featuring an off-the-shoulder neckline and a vibrant floral print in shades of burnt orange, amber, and deep cocoa.

name: Magenta Heart-Print Ruched Maxi Gown
description: A charming and vibrant fuchsia maxi gown featuring a bold white and orange heart-motif print, a flattering V-neckline, and adjustable ruched tie-sleeves for a feminine finish.

name: Scarlet Horizon Strap Gown
description: A striking maxi gown featuring a solid crimson red sleeveless bodice with thick straps, flowing into a voluminous skirt with a teal, orange, and black abstract painterly print.

name: Harvest Leaf Collared Maxi Gown
description: A vibrant, floor-length shirt-dress featuring a bold autumnal leaf pattern in shades of red, blue, green, and yellow with a structured pointed collar and short sleeves.

name: Sapphire & Amber Mosaic Kaftan
description: A relaxed-fit Bubu-style kaftan featuring a rich sapphire blue base with intricate amber and gold mosaic patterns and a classic V-neckline.

name: Teal Adire Silk Kaftan
description: A luxurious full-length silk kaftan featuring a traditional teal and black Adire tie-dye pattern, designed with a contrasting black V-neckline and functional front pockets.

name: Sunset Adire Batik Silk Kaftan
description: A luxurious full-length silk kaftan featuring a vibrant sunset-inspired palette of magenta, orange, and yellow in a traditional batik tie-dye pattern, finished with a contrasting black V-neckline and deep front pockets.

name: Fuchsia Blossom Bubu Maxi
description: A floor-length, voluminous Bubu maxi gown in vibrant fuchsia pink with a white floral stamp pattern. Features multi-colored geometric print ruffled straps and matching oversized patch pockets for a bold, traditional-meets-modern look.

name: Mosaic High-Waist Maxi Skirt
description: A vibrant and voluminous maxi skirt featuring a high-waisted band with black and white tribal motifs, flowing into a multi-colored geometric mosaic print in primary tones.

name: Emerald Orbit Flare Midi Dress
description: A sophisticated forest green midi dress featuring a structured bodice and a flared skirt with vibrant lime and white geometric 'orbit' print insets.

name: Cloud White Relaxed Two-Piece Set
description: A chic and effortless all-white ensemble featuring a short-sleeved button-down shirt with a structured collar and matching wide-leg trousers for a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: Turquoise Paint-Splatter Tunic Set
description: A bold and artistic two-piece set featuring a longline turquoise tunic with a high mandarin collar and matching wide-leg trousers, all adorned with a vibrant, multi-colored abstract paint-splatter motif.

name: Tropical Leaf Asymmetric Tunic Set
description: A striking two-piece set featuring an asymmetric-cut tunic in a vibrant multi-colored tropical monstera leaf print, paired with tailored wide-leg trousers in a bold fuchsia pink.

name: Garden & Groove Tunic Set
description: A sophisticated pattern-clash set featuring a short-sleeved tunic with a vibrant pink and blue floral motif on a lime green leafy background, paired with wide-leg trousers in a striking green and black organic zebra-style print.

name: Cobalt & Amber Abstract Tunic Set
description: A striking two-piece set featuring a longline tunic with a high mandarin collar in an abstract cobalt blue, amber, and black print, paired with matching wide-leg trousers for a seamless, artistic look.

name: Mosaic Cargo Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Artisanal-print wide-leg trousers that combine traditional mosaic patterns with modern utility. Featuring oversized lime green cargo pockets and a relaxed, extra-long silhouette for a bold streetwear statement.
